output.sparql:
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?eventLabel ?winnerLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q9668 wdt:P3443 ?event .
  ?event wdt:P641 wd:Q193401 .
  ?event wdt:P31 wd:Q212787 .
  ?event p:P1344 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P1344 ?winner ; pq:P1346 wd:Q19717 .
  ?event rdfs:label ?eventLabel .
  ?winner rdfs:label ?winnerLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?eventLabel) = 'en' && LANG(?winnerLabel) = 'en')
  FILTER(REGEX(?eventLabel , 'Men' , 'i'))
}
ORDER BY ?eventLabel
